parameters: You've been frequenting DoReMi Fuckingdom, right? I heard they
only accept Spirit Stones as currency.
Please, let me assist you. I can give you these five Spirit Stones...
Deathpolca catches the Bohelos Gentleman's eye. Accept his request?
I simply want to support you out of the goodness of my heart!
\}...And maybe get my rocks off at the same time.
You! You're the murderer Lily Killer!
Please, hear my story. I was raised in a very strict environment.
They wanted me to excel, and every day felt like torture.
That ends today! I want my life to end at the hands of a
...I know. I've heard you spend time in DoReMi Fuckingdom.
Will you accept my request for five Spirit Stones? I want to have
one good memory to take to my grave.
Lily Killer catches the Dangerous Gentleman's eye. Accept his request?
No? I see... Understandable. Who would want to lay with a man as

We're the ones who launched a surprise attack! How could they

Eventually we'll be able to travel from here to other countries,

We finally get a day off. Let's just use it to relax.
There aren't many gardemons around who can give us a lift.
Let's ask the one at the estate.
Now's not the time for a detour. We need to get to Bohelos Castle.
I need to talk to Todeira. He's up at Bohelos Castle.
He died heroically battling the knights.

Lots. Humans. Died. Lots. Demons. Died.
Lately. Humans. More. Demons. Also. More. Happy.
Fight. Over. Happy. No. More. Die.
Demons actually exist!? Why is this happening to me!? This is really
Damnable demons! They killed so many humans! How dare they try
to talk to me like that means nothing!
Unforgivable! I'm going to make them pay for this!
The demons have even occupied Maximus! They're throwing the
Those goddamn demons! They're still aiming for world domination!
How many must die before they're satisfied!?
Those damn demons have even moved on Kumin! A country that
Those shitty demons! They've actually conquered the whole world!
Doesn't that mean the world of humans is done for!?
Someone's got to stop them! Someone... Isn't there anyone who
The demons told me to keep living my life as it was before!
Easy for them to say after they overturned it!
Those horrible, disgusting things! I wish they'd all just die!
Many people decided to join in on the great escape plan.
I wanted to as well, but I had a bad feeling about it...
And then the massacre happened! Unforgivable! Those filthy
I'll never make peace with the demons!
This is terrible... So many people died! This is further proof that
demons are dangerous and shouldn't exist!
Saint Bohelos doesn't walk among us! If she did, there wouldn't be
so many dead, and the Magic Cannon never would've been built!
Saint Bohelos will save all! Anyone besmirching her name by
pretending to be her will be struck down by the divine!
People say the demonic Saint Bohelos sold herself to the Empire to
bring peace to the south of the continent...
I won't be fooled! Those demons, spreading such lies! They might
have the Empire fooled, but they won't fool me!
Thanks to the demons, the church is a complete mess. Well, it was
actually the knights who tore it apart for their battle plans.
Ever since the massacre, people have been coming here every day
The gods are testing us, but for what, I don't know.
I've also helped lay demons to rest here, at their request.
Demons want their fellows' souls to rest in peace. How is that any
I've helped lay another large number to rest. Both humans
How long will these tragedies continue? Just what is the root
There are two statues here in the church. One is of God,
while the other is of Saint Bohelos.
Many people are saying Saint Bohelos is actually a demon,
and more are coming to the church every day.
I get the feeling that for them, the statue of Saint Bohelos is the
Demons are terrifying things. You should... Oh, you're one yourself.
Have you realized yet? The demons' true... Oh, you're one yourself.
They attacked a festival celebrating a full century of peace!
My grandson ran with the others... Why did this have to happen to
The weather's lovely today... I think I go pay a visit to
Those demons are always running amok! Now that the Human
Liberation Army's been defeated, the Empire's our only hope!
My father was a slave. He was a violent man who had no problem
raising a hand against his children.
Still, he was the most affectionate man I knew. He said he'd
learned how to love from Saint Bohelos.
If Saint Bohelos really does walk among the demons, she's probably
suffering from the depths of her love.
I heard Saint Bohelos was taken by the Empire in order to save the
They say Saint Bohelos walks among the demons. If that's a lie the
demons thought up, then this is a just end.
But if it's true, I can think of no sadder ending.
I wonder what's going to happen now. Are the demons really going
The demons seem to have a lot of free time. Wait... Have they
The demons who went crazy started rampaging right around here.
It was terrifying. I thought I was going to die.
The demons have been really quiet lately. Looking at them,
I'd never think they could go berserk like they did.
The demons told me to keep protecting Bohelos! I don't need them
to tell me that! I'll do it anyway!
This stupid brainwashing... I can't even get mad at the demons
We haven't been facing any attacks lately. Those damn demons...
Looks like the demons had to take out their own. Serves them right.
What the... Saint Bohelos is a demon? Then why are we...?
I heard the demonic Saint Bohelos sold herself to the Empire to try
What's with that? It leaves a bad taste in my mouth...
The Kingdom of Bohelos, a country of peace and equality... I guess
the only thing that's changed is that we're ruled by demons now.
For some reason, it's really tranquil today. It feels kind of nostalgic.
The demons are getting closer to their goal, but there aren't many
of them left. Looks like they're getting desperate.
Saint Bohelos walks with the demons, and the deceased Knight
Commander's taking part in their fight.
What's going on? Are those just lies the demons made up?
The demons' conflict with the Empire is over. Apparently they
They actually went and spoke with the supreme ruler of the
continent... I guess I might reconsider my opinion of them.
